_help: Company slugs the shared job_cache refresh (packages/core/src/refreshJobCache.ts, run on a schedule by .github/workflows/refresh-job-cache.yml) fetches and caches for every user, signed in or not. Deliberately separate from config/targets.json (gitignored, holds this operator's personal profile/PII/safe_fields) — this file is committed and public, so it must only ever hold company slugs, nothing personal. Same slug format as config/targets.example.json's matching fields. Every slug below was verified live against its ATS's public API (real, non-zero postings) before being added — see the 2026-07-22 refresh-job-cache session for the full probe results. Weighted toward high-volume boards ('well-known, not-yet-mega-cap' growth companies) so the cache has real breadth, not just coverage.
